hook: Swipe to Delete Items in Odoo POS Cart
pitch:
Make POS operations faster with intuitive swipe-to-delete.
No complex setup,
No learning curve,
Just smoother checkout flow.

feature_matrix.name: Mobile-friendly swipe gestures for line deletion
Works on both touch and non-touch devices

benefits.title: Faster Checkout
benefits.description: Speed up the checkout process by making line removal quick and intuitive

benefits.title: Better UX
benefits.description: More natural interaction that feels at home on touch devices

benefits.title: Error Prevention
benefits.description: Swipe gesture prevents accidental deletions compared to small delete buttons

overview.title: Quick Delete Actions
overview.description: Remove items from cart with a simple swipe gesture - perfect for busy environments

overview.title: Works Everywhere
overview.description: Compatible with all devices running Odoo POS - from desktop to mobile

troubleshooting.solution: Ensure browser touch events are enabled and no interfering scripts
Check for custom POS CSS overrides that might affect animations

setup.title: Install Module
setup.description: Install through Odoo Apps or upload zip file
